title: Auditex
description: B2B SaaS for automated extraction of structured data from French professional documents using AI.
longDescription: Auditex is a document intelligence platform built for French businesses that need to extract structured data from payslips, CVs, patents, and invoices. The system leverages Claude API with zero data retention for privacy-compliant AI extraction. I designed and built the full product end-to-end — from a classification guardrail feature using Claude Haiku to prevent misrouted documents, to fine-tuned extraction prompts for complex French payslip fields (primes, cotisations, net imposable). The frontend was modernized from a legacy setup to Vite + Tailwind + shadcn/ui with a full dashboard redesign across multiple iterations. Operated under Updev Solutions.

title: Grow Online
description: Cross-platform social media automation SaaS with AI-powered video processing and scheduling.
longDescription: Grow Online is a social media automation platform enabling creators and businesses to manage content across Instagram, Facebook, Threads, TikTok, YouTube, and LinkedIn from a single dashboard. I built the full OAuth integration flows for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and LinkedIn APIs, navigating each platform's review and approval process. The standout feature is the 'Automate' module — a visual workflow builder that lets users define content pipelines with a Gemini Flash-based transcription and clip detection engine for automatic short-form video generation. Infrastructure runs on Hetzner VPS with Docker and GitHub Actions CI/CD. The product's visual identity leans into a nature-focused illustration style.

title: Voicy
description: Automated B2B voice prospecting agents using AI-generated speech and telephony.
longDescription: Voicy is an automated voice prospecting platform that conducts outbound B2B sales calls using AI-generated speech. The system orchestrates call flows with ElevenLabs for realistic voice synthesis and Twilio for telephony, managed by a NestJS backend. Prospects receive natural-sounding calls from AI agents that can handle objections, qualify leads, and book meetings. The goal was to scale outbound prospecting without scaling headcount.

title: SquAIre — Armatis
description: RAG-based knowledge management system for customer service agents at Armatis.
longDescription: SquAIre is a knowledge management platform built at Armatis to empower customer service agents with instant, AI-powered access to internal documentation and procedures. Using a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architecture, agents can query the knowledge base in natural language and receive grounded, accurate answers sourced from company documentation. This reduced average handling time and improved first-call resolution by giving agents reliable answers without manual document searches.

title: POSI-BTP — CCCA-BTP
description: AI career positioning platform for the French construction sector using self-hosted LLMs.
longDescription: POSI-BTP is an AI-powered career positioning tool built for CCCA-BTP, the national organization overseeing apprenticeship training in the French construction industry. The platform helps apprentices and professionals explore career paths, assess their skills, and receive personalized guidance. A key technical differentiator is the use of self-hosted LLMs on Scaleway infrastructure, ensuring data sovereignty and cost control at scale. The project involved fine-tuning prompts against domain-specific construction trade terminology and French labor market data.

title: Autoscribe — Steamulo
description: Automatic meeting transcription pipeline built during early career at Steamulo.
longDescription: Autoscribe is an automatic meeting transcription system built during my time at Steamulo. The pipeline captures audio from meetings, processes it through speech-to-text models, and outputs structured, searchable transcripts. This was an early project that shaped my trajectory toward AI-powered document and audio processing systems.

title: bastienyoussfi.dev — Portfolio
description: Immersive developer portfolio with AI chat interface, pixel cat mascot, and editorial dark aesthetic.
longDescription: My personal portfolio site at bastienyoussfi.dev, designed as an immersive experience rather than a traditional dev portfolio. The centerpiece is an AI-powered chat interface where visitors can converse with a pixel cat mascot named 'Bounty' to learn about my work. The site features a 'Collapse & Anchor' hero-to-chat transition animation and a halftone/editorial dark aesthetic. Built to showcase both technical depth and design sensibility.
